description: Ground-truth case against the bank's own sample SIF file. PENDING — fill this in once you have the official DIB (or your bank's) sample SIF template and run the output through the bank's SIF validation tool.
instructions: 1. Request the official WPS SIF sample file from your bank/agent.
2. Request the bank's SIF validation tool (or use their online portal).
3. Reverse-engineer the sample to populate 'fixture_data' below.
4. Run the worker against that fixture data.
5. Compare the output line-by-line against the official sample.
6. Upload the output to the bank's SIF validation tool.
7. If the tool accepts it → mark status: CONFIRMED and record the result.

known_from_dib_reference.record_order: EDR/EVP first, SCR last (per DIB guide)
known_from_dib_reference.source: Dubai Islamic Bank WPS SIF technical guide

fixture_data: PENDING — populate from official bank sample
